title: David González Durán
text:
Bio
Hi! I’m David González Durán, graduated in Universidad de Granada. Enthusiast of Machine Learning, specially as applied to Computer Vision and Data Science. I’m looking to start my career in a environment that allows me to develop challenging projects using state-of-the-art technology. I am motivated by the versatility of machine learning, enjoying process of exploring and applying these models in new fields. I am not afraid to dive into other areas of knowledge to make AI not just a promise, but a tool for solving complex real-world problems.

title: David González Durán
text:
Personal life
Living in València, España.
